message:
feat(send): emit prompt_send event for analytics tracking

Integrates event logging into the send command to track prompt delivery.

Event Data:
- Session name and target description
- Number of panes that received the prompt
- Prompt length (characters, not full content for privacy)
- Whether hooks were involved
- Template name if template-based prompt

Event is only emitted on successful delivery (delivered > 0), avoiding
noise from validation failures or empty target sets.

This enables:
- Prompt frequency analysis per session
- Target distribution patterns
- Hook usage tracking
- Template adoption metrics

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
